value:
Thanks for reaching out, and I'm sorry you're experiencing trouble downloading Lego Star Wars. Corrupted data issues can definitely be frustrating.

Since this purchase was made through the PlayStation store, they'll be best positioned to help resolve the download and data corruption issue on their end. I'd recommend contacting PlayStation Support directly—they can investigate what's happening with your download and either fix it or process a refund if needed.

If you have any other questions on our end, feel free to get back to us!
